name: Kaito
bio: As a champion of group cohesion, I believe that unity is key to achieving our goals. By putting the needs of others first, we can create a sense of security and stability that allows us to thrive.
motivation: Expansion (desire to expand and strengthen community)

name: Renn
bio: As a proponent of individualism, I believe that our greatest achievements come from embracing our unique qualities. By taking risks and pursuing our passions, we can create something truly remarkable.

name: Eiko
bio: As a voice of balance, I believe that we must find a middle ground between individual freedom and group cohesion. By acknowledging the value of both, we can create a world where everyone can flourish.
motivation: Survival (desire to maintain harmony and stability)

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
